title: Add accessors to all container config and state fields
body:
This way we won't have to grab the entire config to look up individual items

Note: does not have accessors for the spec yet

comments.body: LGTM, only wish there was a way to automate this or at least test when someone adds a new field, that there is an accessor
Changes LGTM, smoketested got smoked though.
